description: Compressed tensor from Qwen2.5-Coder-3B, layer 0 Q projection
notes: All strings are hashed with SHA-256 before being submitted on-chain. Codec fields (codec_id, group_size, bits_per_weight, architecture, cosine_claim, ppl_delta_bps) are now typed on-chain fields, not hashed blobs. Anyone can fetch the off-chain artifact and independently verify cosine_claim.
